description_long: This house features a modern, rectangular layout with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The structure is composed of several interconnected volumes, with the main building mass centrally located and surrounded by smaller annexes. Large window openings are visible on multiple sides, suggesting ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials, likely concrete or stucco, with some darker accents for contrast. The property is bordered by a paved area, possibly a driveway or sidewalk, and includes a small entryway with steps leading up to the main door. Minimal landscaping and a focus on functional outdoor space reinforce the modern, urban character of the house.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with clean lines, large windows, and a light exterior finish, surrounded by paved areas and a small entryway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entryway, steps, and a clear view of the central building mass.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated paved area and the arrangement of annexes along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the back of the house, additional windows, and the full extent of the flat roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the secondary entry points and the relationship between the main structure and annexes.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, minimal overhang, and a simple modern door
